name: Berbere Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp red pepper flakes or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice of 1 lemon (1/4 cup)
2. Finely chop onion.
3. Mince garlic and ginger.
4. Place onions, garlic, ginger, peppercorns, red pepper, coriander, cardamom, fenugreek, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, salt, and paprika in a dry skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat 3 to 4 minutes, or until spices are lightly roasted and fragrant.
6. Combine roasted spice mixture, olive oil, and lemon juice in a blender.
7. Puree to a smooth paste.
8. Spread the paste on meat and marinate overnight.
WARNING: A little of this spicy mixture goes a long way! Makes enough marinade for 1 1/2 pounds tuna, pork tenderloin, and sirloin steak.
